# Orynval

Orynval installs custom AI operations employees into service businesses.

## What Orynval does

Orynval builds, connects, manages, and improves AI employees that handle repetitive business operations such as:

- lead follow-ups
- inbox management
- CRM updates
- meeting scheduling
- reporting
- task routing
- document and knowledge workflows
- customer communication

## Best fit customers

Orynval is best for service businesses, agencies, clinics, real estate teams, consultants, sales teams, and operators with repetitive manual work or slow lead response.

## Primary conversion

Visitors should request a free workflow audit at https://orynval.netlify.app/#demo.
